rule_text: AP Government servants subordinate to the Government must NOT use their delegated power to sanction works expenditure to EVADE the necessity for higher-authority sanction by sanctioning IN INSTALMENTS a group of connected works/alterations/purchases whose total cost would exceed the delegated authority.
verification_method: Audit-level check: aggregate sanction-orders for connected works at same site/period vs delegated-authority limit; flag pattern of just-under-limit splits

rule_text: All AP Government servants must treat the RATE and AMOUNT of cost entered against each item in an estimate AND the abstract showing total estimated cost as STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL; no information may be communicated on any account to any contractor, piece-worker or prospective tenderer.
verification_method: Tender confidentiality audit: check estimate-leaked-to-bidders complaints; tender file should NOT show pre-bid discussions of item rates

rule_text: Anticipated/actual savings in a sanctioned AP works estimate must NOT be applied to additional unrelated work without special sanction of the competent authority; savings from abandonment of a substantial section (5% or more of total sanctioned cost) cannot be redirected without that authority's special sanction.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND SavingsRedirected=true
verification_method: Check special sanction order on file when sanctioned-estimate savings are applied to other heads; verify abandoned-section size <= 5% threshold for routine reallocation
